ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report
Off Calendar Oct-05-2020 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT
Off Calendar Mar-04-2020 Continued To Apr-06-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2020 Continued To Mar-04-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Jeffery Byers.

Ms. Stoneman apologized to the Court, stated that she had medical issues, that this was her error and she takes responsibility, that she never filed a final closing petition and that she didn't get the Probate Examiner's notes. The Court informed that there needs to be a corrected notice, that she needs to address any unpaid creditors, that there needs to be an amendment and that she needs to address the Fidelity account. The First and Final Report of Administrator, etc. is continued to March 4, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-22-2020 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT
Off Calendar Dec-30-2019 Continued To Jan-22-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that this matter has been continued several times. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on January 22, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, why courtesy copies have not been provided and why a correct proof of service has not been filed. The First and Final Report of Administrator and Petition to Close Estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Trausch. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT
Off Calendar Nov-27-2019 Continued To Dec-30-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT
Off Calendar Oct-07-2019 Continued To Nov-27-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-07-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2019 Continued To Oct-07-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on October 7, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, why courtesy copies of the petition and a proposed order have not been provided, and why they have failed to provide proper notice. The First and Final Report of Administrator, etc. is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT
Off Calendar Aug-19-2019 Continued To Sep-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-03-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-05-2019 Continued To Jul-03-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Jeffery Byers.

Ms. Stoneman stated that she is trying to get a hold of the Petitioner, that the last time they connected he was confused and thought that he had already accounted, and that she will file the inventory and a petition within the next week, or take it off calendar. The Court informed Ms. Stoneman that she can not take the matter off calendar and that either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration needs to be filed by June 27, 2019. Status on close of estate is continued to July 3, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
